subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of the Prison, raised by Him Who hath been wronged - verily there is no God but Him, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد اسمع الندآء من شطر السجن من لدی المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @station of the Manifestation of God, @twin Manifestations, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
